title: cineraria densiflora
intro: Cineraria densiflora, also known as the Cape marigold, is a flowering plant native to South Africa. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of gastrointestinal issues and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cineraria densiflora include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and even showing potential in the treatment of certain cancers. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers, leaves, and roots are often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
